matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0001011 3
4 0000101 2
5 0000001 1
6 0100001 2
7 0001101 3

70 07 1000100 2

35 53 0001101 3 match 7

60 06 0000101 2 match 4
71 17 1001110 4
